name: Fantasma x 360 Vision International Camp
location: Veterans Field, 4170 Sardis Rd, Murrysville, PA 15668
description: A 3-day international training camp hosted by Fantasma Football and 360 Vision Academy from Germany. Players will be grouped by age and trained by an international coaching staff, with additional guest coach appearances throughout the camp. Expect high-intensity technical sessions, tactical development, and competitive play across all three days. A select group of approximately 3 standout players will earn the opportunity to travel to Valencia, Spain alongside players selected from the 360 Vision Camp in Savannah, GA.
